title: [SNC ADDON] Partners Plus
description: This addon adds interactable menus with special villagers to level your relationship with them, it also adds some beloved characters like "Pastor Nick" & "Dina Fritz".
body:
A quirky little addon that replaces the old villager “reproduction” chat spam with Minecraft’s shiny new **Dialog System**. Instead of instant love hearts and awkward silence, players now progress through charming interaction stages & introductions, bonding, affection, and eventually, starting a family. Build enough trust and interaction points, and you’ll unlock deep personal questions about their past *some might even confess to having **royal blood** running through their pixelated veins*.

![NPCs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4546763c46aa18a013038c0d4b0990fc28dd734.png)
